product: Create and write to Unity Catalog tables from external Delta clients (Beta)
tagline: The Unity REST API now supports write and create access to Unity Catalog external and managed Delta tables from external Delta clients such as Apache Spark.
what_it_does: The Unity REST API now supports write and create access to Unity Catalog external and managed Delta tables from external Delta clients such as Apache Spark. External Delta tables support full read, write, and create operations. Creating and writing to Unity Catalog managed Delta tables is available in Beta and requires catalog managed commits to be enabled.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Unity REST API now supports write and create access to Unity Catalog external and managed Delta tables from external Delta clients such as Apache Spark. External Delta tables support full read, write, and create operations.

capabilities.title: SELECT on the table for
capabilities.desc: SELECT on the table for reads

capabilities.title: MODIFY on the table for
capabilities.desc: MODIFY on the table for writes

capabilities.title: CREATE on the schema for
capabilities.desc: CREATE on the schema for table creation

capabilities.title: For external writes to managed
capabilities.desc: For external writes to managed Delta tables, verify that the table being written to has catalog commits enabled.

key_takeaway: The Unity REST API now supports write and create access to Unity Catalog external and managed Delta tables from external Delta clients such as Apache Spark.
